mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bookings WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bookings (culture_id, culture_name, culture_image, location, duration, name, phone, book_date, count, status, user_openid, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{cultureId}, #{cultureName}, #{cultureImage}, #{location}, #{duration}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{bookDate}, #{count}, #{status}, #{userOpenid}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE bookings SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_time IS NULL
mapper.delete: UPDATE bookings SET delete_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
